sentences.arabic: شَهِدَتِ الْأَسْوَاقُ الْمَحَلِّيَّةُ ارْتِفَاعًا فِي أَسْعَارِ الْخَضْرَوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهِ هَذَا الْأُسْبُوعَ.
sentences.translation: Lokalna tržišta su ove sedmice zabilježila porast cijena povrća i voća.
sentences.translationEn: Local markets witnessed a rise in the prices of vegetables and fruits this week.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ التُّجَّارُ إِنَّ السَّبَبَ هُوَ نَقْصُ الْأَمْطَارِ فِي الْمَوْسِمِ الْمَاضِي.
sentences.translation: Trgovci kažu da je razlog nedostatak kiše u prošloj sezoni.
sentences.translationEn: Merchants say the reason is the lack of rain last season.

sentences.arabic: عَبَّرَ الْمُوَاطِنُونَ عَنْ قَلَقِهِمْ مِنْ هَذَا الْغَلَاءِ الْمُفَاجِئِ.
sentences.translation: Građani su izrazili zabrinutost zbog ovog iznenadnog poskupljenja.
sentences.translationEn: Citizens expressed their concern about this sudden price hike.

sentences.arabic: تَحَاوَلُ الْوِزَارَةُ الْآنَ تَوْفِيرَ السِّلَعِ بِأَسْعَارٍ مُنَاسِبَةٍ لِلْجَمِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Ministarstvo sada pokušava osigurati robu po pristupačnim cijenama za sve.
sentences.translationEn: The ministry is now trying to provide goods at reasonable prices for everyone.

sentences.arabic: يَتَوَقَّعُ الِاقْتِصَادِيُّونَ أَنْ تَعُودَ الْأَسْعَارُ إِلَى طَبِيعَتِهَا قَرِيبًا.
sentences.translation: Ekonomisti očekuju da će se cijene uskoro vratiti u normalu.
sentences.translationEn: Economists expect prices to return to normal soon.
